Mobile Astronaut is an engineering problem too

Packet loss is a hidden opponent — respect it.

Play Astronaut Claim bonus

Infrastructure

Prefer stable Wi‑Fi, close heavy background downloads, and watch for thermal throttling that stutters animations.

Ergonomics

Ensure your thumb does not obscure the cashout control; try landscape if portrait feels cramped.

Frequently asked questions

Why do I lose more on LTE?

Latency spikes hurt timing-sensitive cashouts — lower stakes or switch networks.
